title: Sharing between CRM and Work Management

posts.author: fredimac (Fred Macondray)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to have a single Contacts Board shared with Work Management and CRM.

After finding little useful information, I’ve been looking at automation, but not finding anything that immediately makes sense.

Ideally any changes to the primary Contacts Board would update the CRM board, or vice versa.

Eventually I would like to automate export of our client list from HaloPSA to Monday as well.

Thanks in Advance for your input!

~ Fred

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Fred! I’ve got a clear solution to streamline sharing between your CRM and Work Management on Monday.com. I’ll set up a shared Contacts Board that syncs changes bidirectionally between your primary board and the CRM board using Monday’s connect boards and mirror features. This ensures any updates on one side reflect on the other automatically, saving you time and effort.

For automating the export of your client list from HaloPSA to Monday, I’ll integrate the two systems using Make or Zapier, ensuring data flows seamlessly and stays up to date.

posts.author: bjoubert (Benoit Joubert)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Sachin, are you able to share your solution with us?

posts.author: Samtang (Samtang)
posts.cookedHtml: I used connected boards with mirrored columns to share key info between CRM and Work Management. It keeps updates synced both ways without needing to switch boards all the time.

posts.author: Samtang (Samtang)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve set this up by syncing key boards through connected boards and mirrored columns. That way, updates in either CRM or Work Management reflect in both places. For example, our production board pulls customer data from CRM and adds specific items like Bill of materials directly into the workflow, so the team doesn’t have to switch back and forth. Makes the handoff between sales and operations smoother.
